title: Phyllo Pie
description: A traditional Greek dessert with layers of flaky phyllo pastry and a sweet, creamy filling.
instructions: Thaw phyllo pastry according to package instructions. Cover with a damp cloth to prevent drying.
In a bowl, mix together yogurt, honey, cinnamon, and vanilla extract.
Unroll phyllo pastry and cut into 4 equal pieces.
Brush each piece with butter or cooking spray.
Place a piece of phyllo pastry in a baking dish and brush with butter or cooking spray.
Spread a layer of the yogurt mixture on top of the phyllo pastry.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of phyllo pastry on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
If using walnuts, sprinkle on top of the phyllo pastry during the last 5 minutes of baking.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
